posts.text:
Oh I’m aware. 

Hope you’re enjoying my surprisingly wholesome and boring life. Let me know if you find a good deal on the vintage angel skin coral earrings. 

Terrorist scum.


SolarDMax (@SkyEmpiren)

Mossad has an eye on you sis. 

Take care ✨



— https://nitter.net/SkyEmpiren/status/2034494643719537062#m

It’s always twice as bad as you think.


Krystal Ball (@krystalball)

You’ve got to be fucking kidding me. We could use this money for so much good but instead we are using it to murder schoolgirls and start WW3



— https://nitter.net/krystalball/status/2034409564423037192#m
Openly threatening Americans while endlessly playing the victims.

This isn't just a Netanyahu problem. It's an Israel problem. 

Democratic lawmakers are just as controlled by Israeli interests as Republicans are. We need to decouple from Israel. The future of America literally depends on it.

Republicans are currently looking to pass a reconciliation bill that will provide *another $100 BILLION* for Israel's war against Iran. Reconciliation means the Senate could pass the supplemental funding bill with a simple majority if they cut $100 BILLION from programs

Embarrassing. Total clown playing with American lives.


Aaron Rupar (@atrupar)

Q: Last week, you said we're nowhere near sending ground troops to the Middle East--

TRUMP: I don't talk to people like you about that. Why would I tell you I'm sending or not sending? Who would answer a question like that?

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/atrupar/status/2033352735098028426#m

Or almost everyone in Congress.


Bruce Fenton (@brucefenton)

If Tucker is a “foreign agent” shilling for policies of a foreign government then what does the f that make Ben Shapiro?



— https://nitter.net/brucefenton/status/2033315799805374943#m

Head of the ADL, who equates criticism of Israel with antisemitism, suggests targeting Americans who don’t fall in line with exploding pagers. What a vile and disgusting pig. 

How is this okay? I’m sure we won’t hear anything about this on network news, or cable news, or in legacy papers. Pathetic.


Chris Menahan 🇺🇸 (@infolibnews)

WATCH: ADL CEO Jonathan Greenblatt says the kind of "genius" behind the pager attack on Lebanon is now needed to fight antisemitism.

He said this in a speech to th
